note: AI-interpreted from pdfplumber raw text. Dole (21 deliveries) + JR Holland produce tickets (5). Peak late-summer into early autumn: nectarine Spain in multiple formats (bulk 13kg trays, 10x1kg punnets, loose), plum in at least 8 varieties (Ruby Crunch France, Grenadine France, Queen Spain, Angelino Italy/Spain, Stanley Spain, September Italy), watermelon Spain/Brazil both active. Grape season at absolute peak: Itum Spain, Sweet CE Spain, Regal Italy, Autumn Pearl Italy, Late Pearl Italy, Sugarone Italy, Mixed Spain — up to 6 varieties in a single order. Clementine Tangoes Peru arriving in bulk (pre-Spain season). Sharon Fruit (Kaki) first of year: Spain 12/2kg at £0.50 each (18 Sep), SA 18/4kg at £0.306 each (26 Sep). Pomegranate: Egypt 12/5kg cheap (£7), Spain 16/4kg and 10/5kg in volume. Date Medjool Israel (2 Sep, £28/5kg). Strawberry UK Hugh Lowe last of season (25 Sep, £10/10x400g). Blueberry UK premium £19–20.40/1.5kg. Fresh peas UK (6 Sep only). UK veg: marrow, beetroot, courgette, potato washed (£12/25kg = £0.48/kg). Lemon from SA (26 Sep). Apple season launches: NZ Pink Lady £26–28/12kg, Gala France/Poland, Granny Smith France, Braeburn NZ/UK, Bramley UK, Pixie France, Cox UK, Russet UK. Holland focused on veg: courgettes, full pepper range (red/yellow/orange/mixed/pointed), vine/cherry/Dutch tomatoes, celery, mushroom, Chinese leaf, iceberg, cos; late month autumn veg (celeriac, kohlrabi, butternut squash). Big Holland avocado order 30 Sep (11 RTE boxes + 1 green). Dragon Fruit XL and Tamarillo also from Holland (30 Sep).
